channel.title: Curriculum Vitae on Michael Healy's ePortfolio
channel.description: Recent content in Curriculum Vitae on Michael Healy's ePortfolio

item.title: Curriculum Vitae
item.description: Education PhD English, Expected August 2019 Florida State University, Tallahassee, Florida Specialization Rhetoric and Composition MA, English August 2016 University of Nebraska at Omaha, Omaha, Nebraska Comprehensive Exam: Rhetoric and Composition, November 2015 Graduate Certificate, Advanced Writing (15 Hours): Theory, craft, pedagogy, and publication of Creative Nonfiction using video, digital texts, experimental genres, nature writing, and archival research. Relevant Coursework College Writing Instruction (Seminar) Field Based Research Methods (Seminar)
